# Twilio CLI

The Twilio CLI is a tool to help you build faster, test your applications, and simplify the process of working with Twilio APIs from the command line. With the Twilio CLI and its plugin ecosystem, common tasks like managing phone numbers, calling Twilio APIs, and testing your webhook handlers are simpler.

## Get started with the Twilio CLI

Get up and running with the Twilio CLI with these guides. Refer to the left-hand nav for our full documentation.

* [CLI Quickstart](/docs/twilio-cli/quickstart/)
* [Manage CLI Profiles](/docs/twilio-cli/general-usage/profiles/)
* [Work with webhooks](/docs/twilio-cli/general-usage/work-with-webhooks/)
* [Enhance the CLI with plugins](/docs/twilio-cli/plugins/)

## Skip to CLI examples

Prefer to learn as you go? Jump directly into some CLI example scenarios.

* [Get a phone number and explore SMS](/docs/twilio-cli/examples/explore-sms/)
* [Send an email](/docs/twilio-cli/examples/send-email-sendgrid/)
* [Learn how to find the CLI commands for any Twilio API](/docs/twilio-cli/examples/find-more-examples/)
